summary: The diff shows only modifications to backend/main.mo (application logic) and project_state.json (tracking file). There is no evidence of actual deployment to the IC mainnet, no deployment configuration changes, no canister ID updates, no dfx.json modifications, and no evidence that the frontend is accessible via securelytime.com. The project_state.json shows the feature request status as 'pending', confirming the deployment has not been completed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Deploy the current version of the SecurelyTime application to production on the Internet Computer network.
missing_requirements.reason: No deployment artifacts, canister IDs, dfx.json changes, or any evidence of IC mainnet deployment are present in the diff. The project_state.json marks the request as 'pending'. The frontend accessibility via securelytime.com and backend canister liveness cannot be confirmed from the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: Modification of backend application logic in backend/main.mo, including changes to fetchSearchResults and search functions with new error handling for HTTP outcalls.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'Do not modify any application logic or UI during this deployment' and lists 'Changing the UI or backend logic' as a non-goal. The diff shows modifications to backend/main.mo which constitutes changing backend logic.
